title: christella subpubescens
intro: Christella subpubescens is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the sub-pubescent lady fern. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Christella subpubescens is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, which are often used in traditional medicine practices.
